content: Create a new history in Galaxy and upload the datasets. Train a machine learning model to predict patient survival using the multimodal dataset. Use CD3_CD8_images_3GB_jpeg.zip, HANCOCK_test_split_3GB_jpeg.csv, HANCOCK_train_split_3GB_jpeg.csv. Be explicit about each step and the expected deliverables. Prefer this guidance when available: Use a tool that is compatible with multimodal data. Learn the dataset and configure the tool accordingly.. Return structured outputs for tool_name, target, roc_auc.
